message:
fix(analysis): add missing mutex to InDegreeRank/OutDegreeRank

Consistent with all other rank accessor methods that acquire mu.RLock()
before reading. While these Phase 1 fields are set before AnalyzeAsync()
returns (so technically no race), the inconsistency could lead to future
bugs if someone modifies the code to set these fields elsewhere.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
